sections.title: Trying to enter the Theatre before talking to the Mysterious Stranger

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Hey. Over here.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You look like someone who can handle themselves. Are you intending to partake in the Theatre of Blood?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You're wondering what's in it for you I suppose. The citizens of Meiyerditch come here looking for freedom, but I can tell you're no citizen.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Don't worry, you're not the first to sneak in. The guards here turn a blind eye to that sort of thing. Outsiders generally perform better in the Theatre, so make for more interesting entertainment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are you going with this?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You're strong enough to survive the Theatre, but you need a reason to try. I have a little proposition for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go on...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The Theatre is owned by Lady Verzik Vitur, a vampyre noble. I represent a party that has certain... interests in Verzik.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Enter the Theatre and beat the challenges within. Doing so would be quite the embarrassment for Verzik, something that my associates would very much appreciate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You want me to embarrass her? I guess that doesn't sound too bad.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Be aware, this will be no easy challenge. While you may well succeed alone, the guards will let you enter in a group of up to five. I suggest you take advantage of this.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You can use the notice board to find suitable allies with whom to enter the Theatre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any advice to help me?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Actually, I do. Verzik's magic prevents most forms of teleportation. However, there is a special crystal with the power to overcome this restriction.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I have... acquired some shards of the crystal. Do not ask me how. If you take one into the Theatre, you can use it to teleport to safety in an emergency.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some of these crystals?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Of course. It will cost you though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very well, I'll do my best.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. My master is very impressed with your work. On his behalf, allow me to reward you.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Any luck in the Theatre?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I meant to be doing again?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Enter the Theatre and beat the challenges within. Doing so would cause great embarrasment to Verzik, and my associates would very much appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get those teleport crystals you mentioned?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Return to me when that changes.

sections.title: After A Night at the Theatre

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You again. My master is very impressed with your work. I have something for you, if you desire.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get those teleport crystals you mentioned?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you have for me?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You may choose which reward you desire.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you show me one of those memories again?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Which memory would you like to see?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The memory of the Maiden of Sugadinti.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The memory of the Pestilent Bloat.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The memory of the Nylocas Vasilias.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The memory of Sotetseg.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The memory of Xarpus.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The memory of the Nylocas Queen.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Very well.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You should be careful around here friend. If I can tell you don't belong here, they probably can as well.
